description: User clicked the autofill button to parse a job URL
Autofill successfully populated company, role, and/or location from a job URL
Autofill failed to parse the job URL (client-side error feedback)
User moved an application to a different pipeline stage (drag-and-drop or inline update)
User deleted an application from the tracker
User toggled between pipeline (kanban) and table view on the dashboard
User changed their tracking mode (internship vs full-time) from the settings flow
User clicked the Buy Me a Coffee / support link (landing page wiring — event already fired elsewhere)
Server received a request to parse a job URL (server-side)
Server successfully extracted job data from the URL (server-side)
Server failed to extract job data from the URL (server-side)
